title: geranium cicutarium var. pimpinellifolium
intro: Geranium cicutarium var. pimpinellifolium, also known as mouse-ear geranium, is a subspecies of the annual geranium plant that belongs to the family Geraniaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, which helps to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and minor cuts. The plant is rich in health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herb in herbal medicine. Geranium cicutarium var. pimpinellifolium can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
